title: ANIMAL ADOPTION - 211info
text: HIGH PLATEAU HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL ADOPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity to adopt animals, all of which have been spayed or neutered. This is a no-kill shelter. The society also has a food bank that provides pet food for low-income pet owners. 114 E First Street Alturas, CA 96101 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday-Friday 10am-2pm, Saturday 10am-1pm Email (530) 233-9277 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (530) 233-9277 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email for information. Visit website to see adoptable cats and dogs. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lake County Services: Animal Adoption Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - THRIFT STORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIGH PLATEAU HUMANE SOCIETY
